description: Attaches a context menu to compose-window address chips (mail-address-pill elements) and fires an event when the user selects an Addy alias action.

functions.name: setCache
functions.description: Push fresh alias and domain-option data into the experiment for use when building context menus.

events.name: onChipMenuClicked
events.description: Fires when the user selects an action from the right-click menu on a compose-window address chip.

email.description: The email address of the chip that was right-clicked.

displayName.description: The display name of the chip, if any.

fieldType.description: Which field the chip is in: 'to', 'cc', or 'bcc'.

aliasEmail.description: For action=select_alias: the existing alias email to apply.

domain.description: For action=create_alias: the domain to create the alias on.

customPrefix.description: For action=create_alias with format=custom: the alias local-part prefix.
